'''Kaliska''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. The [[Techno-priest]]s of Kaliska developed the [[Visualization engine]].<ref name="TVE">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Investigation|The Visualization Engine}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
